text:
Clairvoyance (lit. , rom. Saitobijon) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to see the details regarding another player's binder, including all the cards within both the designated slots and the free slots.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows the player to view details about the binder of a player they have previously met, mainly a list of all the target player's cards. In some ways, this card is essentially "Peek" and "Fluoroscopy" combined. It can be used long range.

|-
![Eng]
|No.1015 :: Clairvoyance 
You can see all card data of 1 target player.
|}

Trivia

"Clairvoyance" is first mentioned by Degiro in Chapter 133, who used it on Killua to verify if he was holding "Sword of Truth".
Gon used this card at Goreinu's suggestion to check "Chrollo Lucilfer"'s binder in Chapter 158.
